description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet or shelf unit with a rectangular shape and four short legs. The left side features a single large door with a rustic, textured wood finish, while the right side is open with three shelves containing several books and magazines. The top surface is used for display, holding a round wooden decorative object on a stand, a white vase, and a small potted plant. The main structure of the cabinet is matte black, contrasting with the wood door and the lighter-colored objects on top. The back and sides are solid black panels, and there are no visible handles on the door. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern black cabinet with a rustic wood door, open shelving on the right, and decorative items on top. The design is minimalist and functional, with books and decor visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-finished door on the left, open shelves with books on the right, and decorative items on top.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the solid black panel and the thin profile of the decorative objects on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel and the backs of the decorative items.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid black panel and the edge of the open shelving.
